name: polyptych
description: Generic, self-hostable orchestration for walls of screens and fleets of display kiosks.

scripts.build: (cd packages/protocol && bun run build) && (cd packages/server && bun run build) && (cd packages/player && bun run build) && (cd packages/agent && bun run build)
scripts.typecheck: (cd packages/protocol && bun run build) && (cd packages/server && bun run typecheck) && (cd packages/player && bun run typecheck) && (cd packages/agent && bun run typecheck)
scripts.dev: (cd packages/protocol && bun run build) && concurrently -n server,player,agent -c green,cyan,yellow "cd packages/server && bun run dev" "cd packages/player && bun run dev" "cd packages/agent && bun run dev"
